description_long: A bald male security guard stands upright, dressed in a dark olive green uniform consisting of a short-sleeved shirt and matching cargo pants. He wears black combat boots and a black strap crossing diagonally from his right shoulder to his left hip, likely for carrying equipment. A pouch is attached to his left hip, and a wide wristband or armband is visible on his right forearm. The uniform is utilitarian, lacking any visible insignia or formal accessories such as a tie or hat, and appears designed for practical, active duty in urban environments. His facial expression is neutral and alert, and his arms are slightly bent and held away from his body, ready for action. The overall appearance is that of a modern, field-ready security professional.
description: A bald male security guard in a dark olive green uniform with black boots, a cross-body strap, and a utility pouch, standing alert and ready for duty.
description_view_0: Front view shows the guard's facial features, cross-body strap, short-sleeved shirt, and utility pouch on the left hip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the cross-body strap, and the pouch on the hip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the uniform, the full length of the cross-body strap, and the pouch attachment.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the wide wristband or armband on the right forearm and the side profile of the boots and pants.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a utilitarian, short-sleeved olive green shirt and matching cargo pants, paired with black combat boots and a black cross-body strap. The uniform is informal and practical, lacking a tie or hat, and features a utility pouch on the left hip and a wide wristband on the right forearm. The overall style is standardized for active field duty, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with feet shoulder-width apart, arms slightly bent and held away from the body in a ready and alert stance.
